items.title: Secret Service to get tailored suits at taxpayer expense after Kristi Noem disliked how protective detail was dressed: report

items.title: Minnesota Vikings receiver Moore dies aged 25
items.dek: The Minnesota Vikings have paid tribute to Rondale Moore after the 25-year-old's death.
items.body: The Minnesota Vikings have paid tribute to Rondale Moore after the 25-year-old's death.

items.title: Explosions kill police officer and injure 25 in western Ukraine
items.dek: Twenty-five people were injured by explosions overnight in what officials are calling a terror attack.
items.body: Twenty-five people were injured by explosions overnight in what officials are calling a terror attack.
